record.field:
Odoo for Museums

Welcome to the Odoo Museum Management package!

This suite of applications is designed specifically for institutions in the museum sector; whether you're running a historical museum, a contemporary art gallery, or a science and discovery center. Odoo brings everything you need to manage your operations in one place: from selling tickets and managing memberships, to curating exhibitions, overseeing artwork inventory, operating your shop, and coordinating staff schedules.

With integrated apps such as Events, Inventory, Website, Point of Sale, and Planning, the solution streamlines daily operations, enhances visitor services, and improves team coordination.

Focus on curating culture and welcoming visitors, while Odoo handles the behind-the-scenes logistics. 🖼️

Basics

  • Use Events to manage entry slots, ticket types, and attendance.
  • Promote exhibitions and sell tickets online with Website & eCommerce.
  • Handle on-site ticket and gift shop sales through Point of Sale.
  • Automate renewals and benefits with Subscription for memberships.
  • Track artworks and stock locations using Inventory.
  • Place vendor orders for artworks acquisitions or retail items via Purchase.
  • Digitally sign contracts and agreements using Sign.
  • Organize staff shifts with Planning, from front desk to gallery teams.
  • Store contact details for artists, donors, and partners in Contacts.
  • Generate invoices for services and sales through Invoicing.
💡

Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone to manage your entire business in it.

Use Case

By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.

You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.

Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

⚠️

You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Museum package and check the related box.


Manage Ticket Sales & Memberships 

Whether your visitors buy their tickets online or at the front desk, Odoo makes the experience seamless and professional.

Sell Tickets On-Site

  1. Set up an Event for “Museum Entrance”

    1. Enable “Multiple Slots”.

    2. Use the “Slots” button to set and manage each specific entry time slot.

  3. Create a corresponding ticket product; you can customize prices for adults, kids, seniors,...

  4. Design a clean and attractive website page to showcase the museum’s entry options.

  5. At the front desk, open the Point of Sale session, select the ticket and confirm the payment.

Sell Tickets Online

  1. Embed the same Museum Entrance event on your website.

  2. Visitors can choose a time slot, select ticket types, and pay directly online.

  3. Tickets are sent via email with a barcode; ready to scan on arrival via the Registration Desk tab.

Manage Memberships

  1. Create a membership product (e.g., “Annual Museum Pass”).

  2. Set the product type to Service and link it to a Membership Level.

  3. Assign a special price list to the level (e.g., 100% discount on general admission).

  4. When someone purchases the pass, Odoo automatically applies their benefits.

    • For example: A member revisiting the site sees all eligible tickets as €0.

Manage Your Art Collection 

Keep full control over your museum’s acquisitions, loans, and donations; all in one place.

Track All Types of Artwork Acquisition

  1. For each new piece, create a product record with its name, description, artist, and value.

  2. Specify the acquisition type:

    • Purchase: Register a vendor bill and mark the receipt.

    • Donation: Record donor details and assign the artwork to a location.

    • Loan: Set expected return dates and add a reminder activity to coordinate returns.

  3. Store location details (e.g., Gallery C – Permanent Collection) and include notes like “Display on pedestal, under soft light."  on "Description for Receipts field".

💡

Click on the ⚙️ icon to open the Edit Properties menu. This lets you choose what type of information to collect for each artwork, so you can tailor records to how your museum manages its collection.

Handle Exhibition Display Rights

  1. If a piece is on loan with an exhibition display agreement to pay or specify rights, generate a vendor bill reflecting these terms.

  2. Use Sign to upload the contract and get a digital signature from the artist or lender.

  3. Attach the signed agreement to the bill for full traceability.

💡

Create your own “Display Rights Agreement” template in Sign with all required fields. When generating a vendor bill, follow these steps:

Click the ⚙️ icon ‣ Request Signatures ‣ Choose your template ‣ Select the client or lender ‣ Set the signing order ‣ Send for signatures.

Example

You receive a sculpture on loan from an artist.

  • Create the item in your system as a product and log it as a Loan.
  • If needed, upload the loan agreement and via Odoo.
  • Create a receipt to record the loan in your inventory.
  • Log the artwork’s location, for example: “Gallery Room B – Wall 3.”
  • Schedule a reminder to plan the return date.

Run Your Souvenir Shop 

Offer a smooth retail experience in your museum boutique with everything from stock control to checkout.

Set Up the Shop

  1. Create a new Point of Sale session specifically for the boutique.

  2. Add each product (books, prints, souvenirs) with its image, price, and supplier.

  3. Configure tax settings accurately.

Keep Your Inventory Up to Date

  1. Link each product to inventory so you can track how much is in stock.

  2. Set reorder rules to automatically restock from vendors when low.

  3. View real-time stock levels and generate purchase orders directly from the dashboard.

Process Point of Sales:

  1. Use the POS interface at the cash desk or a mobile device.

  2. Accept multiple payment types: cash, card, or gift vouchers.

  3. Print or email receipts instantly.

⚠️

Don't forget to set product categories on your products and assign them to the right Point of Sale. In the POS settings, use Restrict Categories to control which product categories are shown at each sales point, like tickets at the entrance and souvenirs in the shop.

Boost Visibility Online 

Your website is more than just a page; it’s your digital front door.

Build an Engaging Museum Website

  1. Use Odoo’s website builder to create an attractive design with your branding.

  2. Add an Exhibitions page: Highlight current and upcoming events, feature artwork photos, and introduce the artists.

  3. Include a Donations page by adding the “Add Donation” block and customizing it to your needs.

  4. Enable online ticketing by embedding entry offers or event pages with booking options. (see above)

  5. If you offer memberships, create a landing page that explains the benefits and includes a “Join Now” button.

Schedule Your Staff 

Entrance staff, security teams, guides; everyone needs to know where they should be and when.

Build Shift Schedules

  1. Define your operating hours (e.g., 10am–6pm, Tuesday–Sunday).

  2. Create roles like “Front Desk Staff,” “Gallery Attendant,” or “Tour Guide,” and assign them within each Employee’s record.

  3. Use the auto-plan feature to assign people based on availability and expertise.

Communicate Efficiently

  1. Each staff member sees their schedule in their portal or by email.

  2. Last-minute changes? Drag-and-drop makes updates quick and clear.

🎉

You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.

Discover more about Odoo by diving into our documentation and academy, and feel free to request a demo if you need help!

Do You Want to Go Further?

  • With CRM app, attract donors and manage relationships in a streamlined pipeline to stay connected effortlessly.
  • Add the Restaurant app to run your museum’s café or small restaurant.
  • Enhance your website with the Digital Collection feature by embedding interactive 3D images of artworks using iframe for an engaging visitor experience.
  • Collect valuable visitor feedback after events and exhibitions using the Surveys app.
  • Manage your accounting easier than ever with a completely integrated environment thanks to our Accounting App.
🚀

Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?

Schedule a demo
